name: UPEXI, INC.
business: Upexi is in the cryptocurrency industry and the management of cash assets through a cryptocurrency portfolio, primarily focused in Solana tokens and staking of those tokens. The company also continues to be a brand owner specializing in the development, manufacturing, and distribution of consumer products. It reaches consumers through direct-to-consumer network, wholesale partnerships, and major third-party platforms like Amazon.

exposures.sentence: We are in the cryptocurrency industry and the management of cash assets through a cryptocurrency portfolio, primarily focused in Solana tokens and staking of those tokens.
We continue to be a brand owner specializing in the development, manufacturing, and distribution of consumer products.
Our primary sales channel is our eCommerce site and our marketing team is led by an expert in online direct to consumer sales as she has been with the brand since its inception.

catalysts.event: Private placement offering to sell 12,457,186 shares at $4.00 per share, netting approximately $37,077,000
catalysts.sentence: On July 11, 2025 the Company closed on a private placement offering to sell 12,457,186 shares of the Company's common stock at an offering price of $4.00 per share.

catalysts.event: Consummation of $50 million private placement and $151.2 million convertible note offering for Solana treasury
catalysts.sentence: July 2025 The Company consummated a $50 million private placement offering and a $151.2 million convertible note offering in consideration for the exchange of Solana to continue to build its SOL treasury strategy.
Subsequent to June 30, 2025 the credit facility increased to $50,000,000.
